case_title: PATEL, MANUBHAI et al vs. BARNETT, JESSE et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARNETT, JESSE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 964 HOWARD ST, #17 S.F.CA. 94103 $2,512.40 RENT, $96.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,608.40, LEASE FORFEITED, PLAINTIFF TO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE SUM OF $1760.
